sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_social_sources_v1 (
    source_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_class TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_trust_level TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(source_trust_level IN ('low','medium','medium_high','high')),
    official_required_for_high_confidence INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(official_required_for_high_confidence IN (0,1)),
    trade_authority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(trade_authority = 0),
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_social_launch_signals_v1 (
    signal_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_uid TEXT NOT NULL,
    token_name_claim TEXT,
    chain_claim TEXT,
    contract_address_claim TEXT,
    launch_time_claim TEXT,
    officialness_score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(officialness_score >= 0 AND officialness_score <= 100),
    social_burst_score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(social_burst_score >= 0 AND social_burst_score <= 100),
    manipulation_risk_score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(manipulation_risk_score >= 0 AND manipulation_risk_score <= 100),
    onchain_confirmation_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(onchain_confirmation_status IN ('NOT_CHECKED','PENDING','CONFIRMED','REJECTED')),
    risk_gate_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(risk_gate_status IN ('NOT_CHECKED','WAIT_MORE_DATA','PASS','REJECT')),
    signal_truth_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_TRUTH' CHECK(signal_truth_status = 'NOT_TRUTH'),
    trade_authority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(trade_authority = 0),
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_uid) REFERENCES news_social_sources_v1(source_uid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_social_signal_evidence_links_v1 (
    evidence_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    signal_uid TEXT NOT NULL,
    evidence_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(evidence_type IN ('OFFICIAL_POST','EXCHANGE_NEWS','SOCIAL_BURST','LAUNCHPAD_CLAIM','KOL_MENTION','COMMUNITY_BURST')),
    evidence_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    evidence_summary TEXT NOT NULL,
    confirms_contract INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(confirms_contract IN (0,1)),
    confirms_onchain INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(confirms_onchain IN (0,1)),
    confirms_risk INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(confirms_risk IN (0,1)),
    trade_authority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(trade_authority = 0),
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(signal_uid) REFERENCES news_social_launch_signals_v1(signal_uid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_social_review_queue_v1 (
    review_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    signal_uid TEXT NOT NULL,
    review_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(review_status IN ('WAIT_MORE_DATA','READY_FOR_ONCHAIN_CHECK','READY_FOR_RISK_CHECK','REJECTED','ARCHIVED')),
    review_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    deterministic_gate_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK(deterministic_gate_required = 1),
    ai_opinion_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(ai_opinion_required IN (0,1)),
    trade_authority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(trade_authority = 0),
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(signal_uid) REFERENCES news_social_launch_signals_v1(signal_uid)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_social_false_negative_memory_links_v1 (
    memory_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    signal_uid TEXT NOT NULL,
    linked_false_negative_case_uid TEXT,
    linked_rwd_case_uid TEXT,
    memory_role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(memory_role IN ('AUTOPSY_INPUT','LEARNING_SUMMARY_INPUT','RWD_CONTEXT_INPUT')),
    hot_loop_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(hot_loop_allowed = 0),
    trade_authority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(trade_authority = 0),
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(signal_uid) REFERENCES news_social_launch_signals_v1(signal_uid)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_news_social_launch_signals_source ON news_social_launch_signals_v1(source_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_news_social_launch_signals_status ON news_social_launch_signals_v1(onchain_confirmation_status, risk_gate_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_news_social_review_queue_status ON news_social_review_queue_v1(review_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_news_social_memory_signal ON news_social_false_negative_memory_links_v1(signal_uid);
